Ufuk Utku Turuncoglu Assist. Prof. A scientist who study in computational earth system science field at Informatics Institute, Istanbul Technical University, Turkey
  • home /
  • Archive /

  • Tags

About

Ufuk Turuncoglu obtained his undergraduate degree from Department of Meteorological Engineering at Istanbul Technical University (ITU) in 2000. He completed MSc degree in 2003 in Eurasia Institute of Earth Sciences, Climate and Marine Sciences department and started PhD study in the same year at ITU, Informatics Institute, Computational Science and Engineering. As a part of his PhD research, he worked as visiting scholar at National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR), Boulder, CO, USA in 2009. After graduated from the PhD in 2010, he started to work as a visiting scientist in International Center for Theoretical Physics (ICTP), Earth System Physics (ESP) section, Trieste, Italy. In 2012, he started to work at ITU, Informatics Institute, Computational Science and Engineering as an Assistant Professor. Currently, he continues to work in the same department along with the regular associate position in ICTP, ESP Section.
His main areas of interest are computational simulation of atmosphere and ocean model components, visualization with in situ techniques, process automation with scientific workflow systems and climate science. He is also interested in the design and development of coupled Earth system models.

Projects

Integration of in-situ visualization approach with coupled atmosphere-ocean modeling system to study fast-moving physical processes in atmosphere-sea interaction

06/2017 - 06/2019 116Y136 The Scientific and Technological Research Council of Turkey (TUBITAK) Prof. Dr. Ufuk Utku TURUNCOGLU (PI)

Anthropogenic climate change in the Euphrates–Tigris Basin

2015 - 2017 114Y114 The Scientific and Technological Research Council of Turkey (TUBITAK) Prof. Dr. Omer Lutfi SEN (PI) worked as research scientist

Infrastructure for Analysis and Experimentation on Ecosystems (AnaEE)

11/2012 - 10/2016 EU-FP7 Prof. Dr. Nüzhet DALFES (PI) worked as research scientist

Investigation of the effects of Mediterranean and Black Sea on the regional climate system of Turkey using fully coupled atmosphere ocean model

2013 - 2015 113Y108 The Scientific and Technological Research Council of Turkey (TUBITAK) Assist. Prof. Dr. Ufuk Utku TURUNCOGLU (PI)

Enhancing The Capacity of Turkey to Adapt to Climate Change

2008 - 2010 MDG-F-1680-ITU UN-UNDP Project (millenium Development Fund) Prof. Dr. Nüzhet DALFES (PI) worked as research scientist

Impact of European Emissions on Air Quality in Turkey, Development Modeling Framework (Meteorology, Emissions, and Air Quality Models) and Climatologically Evaluation

2008 - 2011 108Y064 The Scientific and Technological Research Council of Turkey (TUBITAK) Prof. Dr. Tayfun KINDAP (PI) worked as consultant

Installation of Disaster Management and Meteorological Early Warning System in Rize Province (RABIS)

2006 - 2008 106G029 The Scientific and Technological Research Council of Turkey (TUBITAK) Prof. Dr. Muhammed SAHIN (PI) worked as research scientist

Potential Accident Threat to Turkey from Surrounding Nuclear Power Plants, Tracer and Trajectory Analysis and Episode Studies

2005 - 2007 105Y046 The Scientific and Technological Research Council of Turkey (TUBITAK) Prof. Dr. Tayfun KINDAP (PI) worked as research scientist

Developing Climate Scenarios for Turkey

2006 - 2008 105G015 The Scientific and Technological Research Council of Turkey (TUBITAK) Prof. Dr. Nüzhet DALFES (PI) worked as research scientist

Skills

Bio

2012 - Assist. Prof. @ Istanbul Technical University, Informatics Institute, Turkey
2011 - 2012 PostDoc in Earth system Physics Section (SHELL Caspian Sea Project - Predicting future Caspian Sea Level, Coupling RegCM4 with ROMS ocean model etc.) @ The Abdus Salam International Centre for Theoretical Physics (ICTP), Trieste, Italy
2008 TDD ESMI Section ESMF Project (Creating self-describing and standardized workflow-based environment for earth system science applications, Supervisor is Cecelia DeLuca) @ National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR), Boulder, CO, USA
2005 - 2012 Research Assistant (HPC Lab System Administrator Group Member, ITU National High Performance Computing Center System Administrator Group Member & Application Support Scientist) @ Istanbul Technical University, Informatics Institute, Turkey
2000 - 2002 Software Developer (Microsoft based Database Systems, MSQL, MS Access, Visual Basic, ASP.NET based applications) @ Caretta Training and Consultation, Istanbul, Turkey
1998 (3 months) ESOE (Ericsson Standard Office Environment) & ESGP (Ericsson Standard Groupware Platform) Project Member @ Ericsson, Turkey

Education
